result: Annual closure completed: 5 vouchers created. Depreciation Kjøretøy: 39800.0 NOK; Depreciation Kontormaskiner: 98337.5 NOK; Depreciation Programvare: 87483.33 NOK; Prepaid reversal: 63250 NOK; Tax provision (22%): 63551.58 NOK
